summary: The diff implements a comprehensive parkour gaming website with 3D obstacle course. Most requirements are well-covered including the 3D environment, player controls, timer, leaderboard, main menu, and neon visual theme. However, a few specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the skybox uses Stars/fog rather than a proper skybox image, ramps are not explicitly present in the course data, and the timer's start trigger logic fires on entering rather than leaving the start zone.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ramps as a distinct obstacle type in the course layout
missing_requirements.reason: The courseData.ts only defines flat box platforms and moving barrier obstacles. No ramp geometry (inclined surfaces) is present in PLATFORMS or OBSTACLES arrays.

missing_requirements.requirement: The environment has a visually distinct skybox using the skybox-bg image asset
missing_requirements.reason: The build request requires a dark urban skybox panorama image (skybox-bg.dim_2048x1024.png). The game uses Stars component and fog for the background instead of the specified skybox panorama image.

missing_requirements.requirement: Timer begins when the player LEAVES the start zone, not when entering it
missing_requirements.reason: In GameScene.tsx, handleEnterStart calls timer.start(), which fires when the player enters the start zone rather than when they leave it. The AC specifies the timer begins when the player crosses the start trigger by leaving it.

missing_requirements.requirement: Player resets to the last checkpoint when falling off the course
missing_requirements.reason: The Player component resets to START_POSITION on fall, but there is no checkpoint system implemented. The AC requires resetting to the last checkpoint or start.

hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only mentions WASD/arrow keys to move/run and spacebar to jump. A dedicated SHIFT sprint key was not requested but is implemented in Player.tsx and listed in ControlsScreen.tsx.
